Operation 'deleteWebhookById' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The summary is clear and actionable, but the description is completely empty. Added comprehensive description explaining: what the operation does (deletes a webhook), the consequence (stops event delivery), required input (webhook ID), expected response (204 No Content), and important side effect (deletion is permanent). This provides AI agents with clear context about when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.description_suggestion: Deletes a webhook by its ID. Once deleted, the webhook will no longer deliver events to its configured endpoint. Requires the webhook ID as a path parameter. Returns a 204 No Content response on successful deletion. This operation cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: The summary is clear and actionable, but the description is completely empty. Added comprehensive description explaining: what the operation does (deletes a webhook), the consequence (stops event delivery), required input (webhook ID), expected response (204 No Content), and important side effect (deletion is permanent). This provides AI agents with clear context about when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'listOffers' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Description is completely missing. Added context about pagination support (consistent with API documentation), offer types (from API context), and what the response contains to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and how to handle pagination.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all offers in your ProsperStack account. Supports cursor-based pagination with configurable limit (default 10, max 100). Returns an array of offer objects with their configurations including type (coupon, pause_subscription, trial_extension, change_plan, or custom), along with pagination metadata for retrieving additional results.
data.reasoning: Description is completely missing. Added context about pagination support (consistent with API documentation), offer types (from API context), and what the response contains to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and how to handle pagination.
